name: Animated Sentinel Patrol
description: Ancient magical guardians patrol the lower ruins, their enchantments still functioning after centuries!

dungeon_l2_encounter_2_complete.display_message: The animated sentinels crash to the ground, their magic finally spent. You continue deeper.

special_rules.description: Animated armor has very high AC (16+), use magic or critical hits

ambient_description: Three suits of enchanted armor patrol in perfect synchronization. As you enter, they turn as one to face you, weapons ready.
victory_description: The magical constructs collapse with a final groan of metal. Their patrol route ends here.
defeat_description: You flee before the relentless guardians. They resume their eternal patrol without a sound.
